description: You are the Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Following Protocol Amendment 03, update the study event definitions in OpenClinica (username: root, password: Admin123!). Rename the 'Baseline Assessment' event to 'Screening and Baseline Visit' and update its description to 'Screening procedures followed by baseline clinical and laboratory assessments per Amendment 03'. Modify the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event to be a repeating visit with the category 'Treatment Window'. Set the category for the 'End of Treatment' event to 'Study Completion'. The 'Adverse Event Report' event should remain unchanged.
